description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a brick exterior and a dark gray gable roof. The property features a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, several lounge chairs, and a small detached structure that could serve as a shed or pool house. The main building has multiple large windows, including a prominent set of arched windows at the front, and a two-car driveway leading to the main entrance. There is a covered patio area with outdoor seating and a balcony on the upper floor overlooking the backyard. The landscaping includes well-maintained grassy areas and paved walkways, giving the house a comfortable and inviting appearance.
description: A spacious modern brick house with a gable roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and a two-car driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, backyard with pool, lounge chairs, and a detached shed.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, lounge area, and upper balcony overlooking the yard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long brick wall, backyard, and detached shed structure.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, two-car driveway, large arched windows, and front lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows at the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, a small overhang, steps, and a two-car driveway
